step_title: 同步 community_integration.mjs 并复测 openclaw-33 Unix socket 通道
summary: 远端 community_integration.mjs 当前 SHA256=37543EAEE1CDB7DEEF70F5295E97153BD182F196D18B48E77748BF166925D3B4，与本地目标 5ECDA763BD383882C1DE49976957D959D6E31D998A949D507276ECFA71684021 不匹配。openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33.service 仍 crash-loop；journal 不再出现 EADDRINUSE，但出现 SyntaxError in community_integration.mjs line 36；Unix socket 未创建，/send/openclaw-33 仍为 502 upstream_unavailable。当前 blocker 未解除，尚不能进入 worker status submission 验收。
blocker: live remote community_integration.mjs does not match the local fixed version and the deployed file currently crashes with SyntaxError line 36 before creating the Unix socket
tests: sha256sum remote community_integration.mjs != local fixed sha
systemctl status openclaw-community-webhook-openclaw-33.service shows activating auto-restart exit 1
journalctl no longer shows EADDRINUSE but shows SyntaxError in community_integration.mjs line 36
